name: Mort Sahl
blurb: Newspaper in hand, the pioneer of political stand-up.
bio: Mort Sahl invented modern political stand-up, walking on with a rolled-up newspaper and riffing on the day's headlines instead of trading setups for punchlines. He skewered both parties from Eisenhower through Nixon and beyond.

timeline.ev: Breaks out at the hungry i in San Francisco
First comedian on the cover of Time
Writes material for John F. Kennedy

accolades: First comedian on the cover of Time magazine (1960)
Grammy nomination for Best Comedy Performance
Widely called the father of modern political satire
